reviews.review_title: Very fun and cool game, but a bit buggy.
reviews.review_description: I really am enjoying this game. Idk why i like it so much but its calming. Beach is my favorite map but the sky gave me nausea for a bit and the grass gives snow :) .  canyons ropes have the lines textures but its not much of a deal. You sadly cant buy cosmetics because its bugged but its ok. In the mountains there is a bug that happens when you slide and put you hands down the sliding stops. Anyways this game is cool and thats pretty much it thx for reading bye :)

reviews.review_title: If there was 0 stars I would give it a 0
reviews.review_description: Every time I launch the game, I start in tutorial and once I get out of tutorial, No one is in forest, it says there’s zero people online, and once I press enter to change my name, IT DOESN’T WORK! Plus, it’s just Gorilla tag’s Valentine update and 3rd anniversary update and Volcano update if it was a single player version of Gorilla tag, and Turbo Tag? That’s a terrible name for the game, that sounds like something F1 horizon would make on Vr.
